title: Archers' Arsenal
description: Archers' Arsenal is a focused item expansion to the archery system of Minecraft that attempts to make archery more competitive with melee combat.
body:
**Archers' Arsenal** is a focused expansion to the ranged combat system of Minecraft. It attempts to make vanilla-style archery more competitive in modded Minecraft, where boss difficulty can be far higher than in vanilla. It also attempts to reduce grind by making farming for Infinity enchantments less of a necessity with cheaper arrows, arrow-saving quivers, and golden bows with built-in Infinity.

*Current features include:*
* Leather bows
* Iron bows
* Golden bows (with a built-in Infinity enchantment)
* Diamond bows
* Netherite bows
* Villager arrows (cheaper and weaker than vanilla)
* Barbed arrows (more expensive and more powerful than vanilla)
* Quivers (has a 20% chance to save your arrows when held in the off-hand)

All recipes are available on **JEI** and following fairly predictable bow crafting recipes.

*Archers' Arsenal is currently available for:*
* Minecraft 1.19.2 / Forge 43.2+
* Minecraft 1.18.2 / Forge 40.2+

*Archers' Arsenal depends on the Knightcore library. Special thanks to Gruulbby, Kaupenjoe, Vazkii, and wildcard_gamer.*
